outputPreview: Entity-family ownership is tracked across runtime code and tests via dedicated helper scripts and entity files: drones use `tests/support/tech_options/helpers/drone_unlocks_helper.gd` and `entities/drone_flat/drone_flat.gd`; supports use `tests/support/tech_options/helpers/support_unlocks_helper.gd` and `entities/support_flat/support_flat.gd`; frigates use `tests/support/tech_options/helpers/frigate_unlocks_helper.gd` and `entities/frigate_flat/frigate.gd`; motherships are configured via `tests/
